items.raw_desc: Konzol játék 007 First Light - Nintendo Switch 2: Young James Bond007 First Light Nintendo Switch 2 takes you back to the beginning of a legend, to a time when James Bond was just learning to be a spy. As a young naval aviator, he gets the chance to join the prestigious MI6 program and undergo training that will shape his future identity as Agent 007. Expect a riveting mix of action, infiltration and dramatic choices that will determine the kind of man Bond becomes. Uncover the conspiracyThe thrilling story of 007 First Light Nintendo Switch 2 begins with a heroic act that sees Bond recruited into the newly revitalised Double 0 unit. However, his first edgy mission ends in tragedy, forcing him to join forces with his experienced but reticent mentor Greenway. Together they uncover a conspiracy that could shake the very foundations of British government.
